turns.user: Bài đăng gần đây trên instagram của Ronaldo
turns.assistant_text:
Here are the recent posts from Cristiano Ronaldo on Instagram:

1. **Começa a Missão Mundial! 🇵🇹**  
   [View Post](https://x.com/Cristiano/status/2061522452627259422)  
   - Date: June 1, 2026  
   - Favorites: 577,066  
   - Retweets: 35,064  
   - Views: 12,163,496  

2. **Feliz por voltar a casa com a família 🙌🏽🇵🇹**  
   [View Post](https://x.com/Cristiano/status/2061139750380007649)  
   - Date: May 31, 2026  
   - Favorites: 999,216  
   - Retweets: 39,716  
   - Views: 31,045,671  

3. **Fuel like me.**  
   Try my Strawberry S7riker shake with @Herbalife24 Formula 1 Sport. Always be ready ⚽ Start your routine: [Link](https://t.co/KsL71iD2dJ)  
   [View Post](https://x.com/Cristiano/status/2060677859346092127)  
   - Date: May 30, 2026  
   - Favorites: 137,898  
   - Retweets: 11,090  
   - Views: 18,412,738  

4. **RT @WHOOP: Get the look of a legend @cristiano. The latest custom CR7 SportFlex bands are here, available in Home 🔴 and Away ⚪.**  
   [View Post](https://x.com/Cristiano/status/2059971400375345582)  
   - Date: May 28, 2026  
   - Favorites: 0  
   - Retweets: 559  
   - Views: 806  

5. **RT @WHOOP: 177 BPM after @cristiano’s second goal.**  
   [View Post](https://x.com/Cristiano/status/2059244823157068046)  
   - Date: May 26, 2026  
   - Favorites: 0  
   - Retweets: 971  
   - Views: 899  

These posts reflect Ronaldo's recent activities and promotions.
